field_values.action_summary: Tars Tarkas concedes, allowing the protagonist to keep his beast. In the aftermath, the protagonist reflects on his dual existence: the compassionate bond with Sola and the primal, loyal bond with the Watch-thing.
field_values.camera_intent: Close-ups of protagonist face; Soft lighting profiles; Lingering shots on Sola and Watch-thing
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH006_SC005

## Production Intent
Establish the aftermath of conflict through quietude and character reflection. The scene transitions from the tension of Tars Tarkas's concession to a contemplative state where the protagonist acknowledges his dual emotional bonds with Sola and the Watch-thing.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- sola
- tars_tarkas
- watch_thing

## Required Environments
- martian_interior_chamber

## Continuity Constraints
- Post-battle physical state (bruises, dirt)
- Protagonist nudity/metamorphosis status

## Beat List
- BT001: Tars Tarkas concedes the beast to the protagonist
- BT002: The aftermath of the concession settles into silence
- BT003: Protagonist reflects on his dual existence (Sola vs Watch-thing)
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
